metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for Rust, ESP32 C++, Python backend, .NET backend, SwiftUI, and dead code detection

plugins.name: rust
plugins.description: Rust code critique, architecture guidance, and idiomatic pattern enforcement

plugins.name: esp32-cpp
plugins.description: ESP32 firmware review covering FreeRTOS, memory, peripherals, and all chip variants

plugins.name: python-backend
plugins.description: Python backend architecture for Litestar and FastAPI with SQLAlchemy and SOLID patterns

plugins.name: dotnet-backend
plugins.description: Pure .NET 10 backend architecture for Kestrel-hosted REST and SignalR services with DI, data access, and SOLID review

plugins.name: swiftui
plugins.description: SwiftUI patterns and critique for iOS, macOS, and visionOS apps

plugins.name: dead-code
plugins.description: Find and remove dead code, unused imports, and duplicates across any language
